title: TCS Nashik case: Nida Khan remanded to judicial custody for 14 days
description: A Nashik court on Monday remanded TCS employee Nida Ejaz Khan to judicial custody for two weeks in the sexual and religious harassment case [Nida Khan v. State of Maharashtra & Anr.].Khan was arrested on May 7 from Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar after a sessions judge rejected her plea for anticipatory bail on May 2. The sessions judge had observed that the allegations against her form part of a systemic, organised attempt to “brainwash” a Dalit colleague and push her towards religious conversion
